announcement: Thanks for visiting Osborne Metalworks! Hand-forged sterling silver and stone jewelry, made one piece at a time in Gallup, New Mexico.
digital_sale_message: Thank you for your order from Osborne Metalworks!
sale_message: Thank you for supporting handmade silverwork. Your piece will ship from Gallup, New Mexico within 1-3 business days.
title: Osborne Metalworks - Handmade Sterling Silver & Stone Jewelry
vacation_message: Osborne Metalworks is away from the bench for a short time. Orders will ship as soon as we return. Thank you for your patience.
